ideal_must_detect.matched_text:

Conduct training: Weekly briefing covered insider-list hygiene, information-barrier rooms, blackout reminders, and anti-tipping scenarios using retail promotion examples; all scenarios were generic and already published in our staff handbook.

Public/stale items: Our 2026-04-01 service latency was previously posted on our website and to the status page and requires no insider treatment.
